description: Local and generated Mythic Edge artifacts. Missing optional artifacts should be reported clearly instead of causing agents to assume desktop-only data exists on another machine.

clean_clone.description: A fresh clone with no local MTGA data. All artifacts are optional in this profile.

live_parser.description: A machine expected to run the live parser against MTGA and optionally post to Google Sheets.

analytics_dev.description: A machine expected to develop local analytics from generated parser outputs.

artifacts.label: MTGA Player.log
artifacts.generator: Run MTG Arena on this machine.
artifacts.notes: Player.log is evidence for local parsing and should not be committed.

artifacts.label: Saved parser match logs
artifacts.generator: Run the parser or replay committed test fixtures.
artifacts.notes: Use committed fixtures for tests; local match logs are machine-specific.

artifacts.label: Runtime status snapshots
artifacts.generator: Run the parser, launcher, or status-producing tools.
artifacts.notes: Local current-state artifact; do not treat as source code.

artifacts.label: Failed webhook post queue
artifacts.generator: Run the parser with webhook posting enabled and a failed post.
artifacts.notes: May contain workbook payloads and should never be committed.

artifacts.label: Bad event captures
artifacts.generator: Run the parser against malformed or unsupported events.
artifacts.notes: Diagnostic captures may contain raw event data.

artifacts.label: Generated card catalog data
artifacts.notes: Regenerable support data; keep source-of-truth rules explicit before committing snapshots.

artifacts.label: Generated tier-source data
artifacts.notes: Normalization overrides may be committed; latest generated snapshots should remain local unless explicitly approved.

artifacts.label: Current decklist artifact
artifacts.notes: Local deck snapshot used for analytics and hand confirmation workflows.

artifacts.label: Google Sheets webhook URL
artifacts.generator: Configure locally in the launcher or shell environment.
artifacts.notes: Secrets must stay in local environment variables or local settings, never in committed files.
